title: Tauri local inference desktop
scenario: Build a Tauri desktop application with React 19 UI, shared Rust core commands, local model cache/fallback, offline persistence, shadcn-ui and Assistant UI chat, Prometheus Entity Management 3.x with Zustand, and pglite-oxide where configured.
termination: Stop only when a real Tauri launch streams a local-model conversation offline or through an explicit configured provider, persists conversation history, reopens it after restart, emits diagnostics, and passes package-equivalent build proof.

prompts.prerequisites: Verify Tauri CLI, Rust 1.96+, Node 24+, local default model availability or download path, app-data write access, and PEM 3.x package source.
prompts.discovery: Read AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, Tauri/React/Rust patterns, KnowMe UI standard, mood board, shadcn-ui setup, Assistant UI usage, PEM/Zustand conventions, and pglite-oxide docs.
prompts.feynman: Explain how React components use shadcn-ui/Assistant UI and hooks/stores while Rust core owns model loading, inference, diagnostics, and desktop persistence.
prompts.kbd_assess: Assess chat bubbles, model source selection, offline-first launch, model cache/fallback, conversation history, AG-UI events, diagnostics, package build, and restart behavior.
prompts.kbd_analyze: Analyze current Tauri commands, React stores, PEM integration, local package exports, pglite-oxide path, diagnostics file, model cache, and UI composition.
prompts.kbd_spec: Specify shadcn-ui/Assistant UI chat, ContentBlock/AG-UI rendering, no borders Flat 2.0 styling, PEM/Zustand state, pglite-oxide/shared Rust persistence, local fallback model, and boot diagnostics.
prompts.kbd_plan: Plan Rust command/runtime work first, then PEM/Zustand stores, Assistant UI chat shell, model settings, diagnostics, launch proof, packaging proof, tests, critic, and retention.
prompts.research: Confirm current Tauri, Assistant UI, shadcn-ui, PEM 3.x, Zustand, PGlite/pglite-oxide, and local model runtime APIs from official or local source before coding.
prompts.implementation: Implement one waypoint at a time. Use shadcn-ui components over raw HTML where available, Assistant UI for chat structure, PEM 3.x/Zustand for client entity state, and Rust commands for all inference/persistence behavior.
prompts.public_boundary_verification: Run typecheck/tests, production build, Tauri dev or no-bundle launch, disable network where relevant, stream a local-model chat, inspect diagnostics, restart, and reopen the persisted conversation.
prompts.independent_critic: Review whether chat actually uses Assistant UI/shadcn patterns, avoids positive TanStack Query recommendations, persists multiple conversations, handles offline fallback, and proves real Tauri launch instead of screenshots only.
prompts.reflection_retention: Record model/runtime constraints, UI fidelity deltas, persistence proof, diagnostics paths in sanitized form, failed assumptions, and reusable scaffold fixes.
prompts.recovery: If launch, model loading, or persistence fails twice, stop and return to KBD analysis with command output and diagnostics. If UI components are missing, add a skill/template repair.
prompts.stop_conditions: Stop for missing local model strategy, broken package exports, unsupported pglite-oxide assumptions, repeated Tauri launch failure, or no restart persistence evidence.
